page_metadata.biotools__summary: MS²PIP is a tool to predict MS² peak intensities from peptide sequences. This makes it possible to generate in silico predicted spectral libraries for full proteomes. MS²PIP employs the XGBoost machine learning algorithm and is written in Python.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MS²PIP is a tool to predict MS² peak intensities from peptide sequences. This makes it possible to generate in silico predicted spectral libraries for full proteomes. MS²PIP employs the XGBoost machine learning algorithm and is written in Python.
